data.text: P03 A FELISIAN WORLD. (I WAS BEGINNING TO FORGET WHAT THEY
LOOK LIKE) :) AT 320.094 THE LANDING WAS IN A COLD AND
BARREN GROUND WITH MANY FROZEN PONDS AND LAKES, THOUGH BIRDS
WERE SIGHTED. 041.044 WAS AGAIN COLD AND BARREN, WITH A
POINT OF INTEREST (OF SORTS) IN A LARGE ROCK-HILL AT -38.16
NEAR A SMALL LAKE. A HOPPER PRANCED NEARBY. 057.046 WAS
FINALLY ON PLEASANT ENOUH GROUND WITH BUSHES AND A FEW TREES
THOUGH A WATER-BOTTOMED PIT AWAITS AT 69.13. 141.031 WAS
FINALLY A FOREST ON A MOUNTAINSIDE WITH A BIG TREE LOCATED
AT 08.14, AND MANY SMALL PONDS IN THE
